WHAT WE DO
## Turn complex problems into real value.
Leveraging [Heterogeneous Hybrid Compute](https://strangeworks.com/heterogeneous-hybrid-compute), we empower organizations to turn operational complexity into competitive advantage.

HOW WE DO IT
## Delivering outcomes worth shipping.
Our team partners with yours from problem definition to production, with our proprietary technologies helping us deliver better, faster, and smarter outcomes.
EMBEDDED, NOT OUTSOURCED
### An optimization bench for your team.
PhD-level specialists embedded with your team from the first conversation to a production system. The team that defines the problem ships it.
[![](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fhome%2Fteam.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b)](https://strangeworks.com/experts)
[Meet the experts](https://strangeworks.com/experts)
CUSTOM, NOT GENERIC
### An agent that learns your problem.
Aura builds an always-on agent fit to your problem. It learns your domain, integrates with your systems, and keeps improving.
[![](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fhome%2Fagent.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b)](https://strangeworks.com/technology/aura)
[Explore Aura](https://strangeworks.com/technology/aura)
OUTCOMES, NOT OUTPUTS
### An engagement that ships outcomes.
Every engagement ships a working system operators can use Monday morning. Production-grade. Integrated. Maintained.
[![](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fhome%2Foutcome.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b)](https://strangeworks.com/technology)
[See the technology](https://strangeworks.com/technology)
HOW TO START
## Three paths forward.
Whether you want to prove a concept, build capability, or deploy at scale, we have an engagement model that fits.
CURIOUS?
01
### Launchpad
Prove it first. Fixed scope, fixed cost. Get a working proof-of-concept in weeks, not months, with an honest go/no-go recommendation.
[See how to get started](https://strangeworks.com/launchpad)
READY TO BUILD?
02
### Embedded Experts
Embedded, not outsourced. Our experts join your team to solve hard problems and transfer knowledge. You own the outcome.
[See how we work together](https://strangeworks.com/experts)
READY TO SEE?
03
### Aura
Aura is the technology behind every engagement. Use our discovery tool to see what a custom agent could do for your specific problem.
[See how we use Aura](https://strangeworks.com/technology/aura)
![](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fuse-cases%2Fquantum-section-bg-2.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b)
THE QUANTUM BRIDGE
![](https://strangeworks.com/images/use-cases/strangeworks-atom.svg)
## Get Quantum Ready.
We started as a quantum company in 2018, and we will always be a quantum company. But we don't ask you to wait for quantum to arrive to start seeing results today.
[Our story](https://strangeworks.com/about)
Our platform delivers real business value today using classical and quantum-inspired resources, while building your organization's readiness for the quantum future.
![](https://strangeworks.com/images/global/footer-xray.png)
## Ready to solve the unsolvable?
Tell us what you're trying to solve. We'll show you what's possible.
[Talk to an Expert](https://strangeworks.com/contact)

WASN'T?WASN'T?WASN'T?

Aerospace

Optimize complex aerospace operations from design to delivery.

Aerospace

Optimize complex aerospace operations from design to delivery.

We help you turn hard optimization challenges into systems your team can actually use.

See how it's done

Enterprises and governments choose Strangeworks.

9+

years of experience delivering quantum and optimization results

40+

technology partners in our ecosystem

50+

solvers and compute resources available

TRUSTED BY PEOPLE YOU KNOW

WHAT WE DO

Turn complex problems into real value.

Leveraging Heterogeneous Hybrid Compute, we empower organizations to turn operational complexity into competitive advantage.

Plan

Allocate resources, schedule tasks, and optimize capacity under constraints.

Move

Route vehicles, manage logistics, and optimize delivery networks.

Choose

Select the best portfolio, configuration, or product mix under trade-offs.

Predict

Forecast demand, model risk, and anticipate future scenarios.

Simulate

Model complex systems and test scenarios before committing resources.

Adapt

Respond to changing conditions and optimize in real-time.

Validate

Verify solutions meet requirements and find viable approaches.

Explore all use cases

HOW WE DO IT

Delivering outcomes worth shipping.

Our team partners with yours from problem definition to production, with our proprietary technologies helping us deliver better, faster, and smarter outcomes.

EMBEDDED, NOT OUTSOURCED

An optimization bench for your team.

PhD-level specialists embedded with your team from the first conversation to a production system. The team that defines the problem ships it.

Meet the experts

CUSTOM, NOT GENERIC

An agent that learns your problem.

Aura builds an always-on agent fit to your problem. It learns your domain, integrates with your systems, and keeps improving.

Explore Aura

OUTCOMES, NOT OUTPUTS

An engagement that ships outcomes.

Every engagement ships a working system operators can use Monday morning. Production-grade. Integrated. Maintained.

See the technology

HOW TO START

Three paths forward.

Whether you want to prove a concept, build capability, or deploy at scale, we have an engagement model that fits.

CURIOUS?

01

Launchpad

Prove it first. Fixed scope, fixed cost. Get a working proof-of-concept in weeks, not months, with an honest go/no-go recommendation.

See how to get started

READY TO BUILD?

02

Embedded Experts

Embedded, not outsourced. Our experts join your team to solve hard problems and transfer knowledge. You own the outcome.

See how we work together

READY TO SEE?

03

Aura

Aura is the technology behind every engagement. Use our discovery tool to see what a custom agent could do for your specific problem.

See how we use Aura

THE QUANTUM BRIDGE

Get Quantum Ready.

We started as a quantum company in 2018, and we will always be a quantum company. But we don't ask you to wait for quantum to arrive to start seeing results today.

Our story

Our platform delivers real business value today using classical and quantum-inspired resources, while building your organization's readiness for the quantum future.

Ready to solve the unsolvable?

Tell us what you're trying to solve. We'll show you what's possible.

Talk to an Expert
